title: Interactive Cultural Heritage Mapping Platform
objective: CULTMAP will build an interactive platform and digital archive mapping intangible cultural heritage across rural Europe, with a public portal, an e-learning module for educators and a searchable repository of oral histories.

title: Gamified STEM Education for Secondary Schools
objective: EDUGAME develops a gamified e-learning application and teacher dashboard delivering serious game scenarios for STEM classrooms, validated in six countries through an online course programme.

title: Quantum Materials for Next Generation Sensors
objective: QUANTX synthesises novel two-dimensional quantum materials and characterises their spin transport properties for cryogenic sensing instrumentation.

title: Virtual Reconstruction of Endangered Monuments
objective: HERITAGE3D creates virtual 3D reconstructions and a web-based repository of endangered monuments, including VR visits and an open database of photogrammetry models.

title: Digital Toolkit for Museum Educators
objective: OLDPROJ produced a digital toolkit and online course for museum educators.

title: Digital Platform for Citizen Science
objective: NEWSTART builds an online platform and mobile app for citizen science data collection across biosphere reserves.
